name: NurbsSurfaceKnotList
summary: Provides access to the knot vector of a NURBS surface.

methods.name: CreatePeriodicKnots
methods.summary: Compute a clamped, uniform, periodic knot vector based on the current degree and control point count. Does not change values of control vertices.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: CreateUniformKnots
methods.summary: Compute a clamped, uniform knot vector based on the current degree and control point count. Does not change values of control vertices.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(NurbsSurfaceKnotList other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: InsertKnot(Double)
methods.summary: Inserts a knot and update control point locations. Does not change parameterization or locus of curve.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: InsertKnot(Double, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool InsertKnot(double value, int multiplicity)
methods.summary: Inserts a knot and update control point locations. Does not change parameterization or locus of curve.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveKnots
methods.signature: public bool RemoveKnots(int index0, int index1)
methods.summary: Remove knots from the knot vector and adjusts the remaining control points to maintain surface position as closely as possible. The knots from Knots[index0] through Knots[index1 - 1] will be removed.

params.name: index0
params.doc: The starting knot index, where Degree-1 < index0 < index1 <= Points.Count-1.

params.name: index1
params.doc: The ending knot index, where Degree-1 < index0 < index1 <= Points.Count-1.

returns.doc: true if successful, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveKnotsAt
methods.signature: public bool RemoveKnotsAt(double u, double v)
methods.summary: Remove knots from the surface and adjusts the remaining control points to maintain surface position as closely as possible.

params.name: u
params.doc: The u parameter on the surface that is closest to the knot to be removed.

params.name: v
params.doc: The v parameter on the surface that is closest to the knot to be removed.

returns.doc: true if successful, false on failure.

methods.name: RemoveMultipleKnots
methods.signature: public int RemoveMultipleKnots(int minimumMultiplicity, int maximumMultiplicity, double tolerance)
methods.summary: Remove multiple knots from this surface

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: When you remove knots, the shape of the surface is changed. If tolerance is RhinoMath.UnsetValue, any amount of change is permitted. If tolerance is >=0, the maximum distance between the input and output surface is restricted to be <= tolerance.

returns.doc: number of knots removed on success. 0 if no knots were removed

methods.name: SuperfluousKnot
methods.summary: Computes the knots that are superfluous because they are not used in NURBs evaluation. These make it appear so that the first and last surface spans are different from interior spans. http://wiki.mcneel.com/developer/onsuperfluousknot

params.name: start
params.doc: true if the query targets the first knot. Otherwise, the last knot.

properties.name: ClampedAtEnd
properties.summary: Determines if a knot vector is clamped.

properties.name: ClampedAtStart
properties.summary: Determines if a knot vector is clamped.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the total number of knots in this curve.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the knot vector value at the given index.

properties.name: KnotStyle
properties.summary: Gets the style of the knot vector.
